Official specifications list 158 x 77 x 11.5 mm dimensions, 338g weight, 6in 2160 x 1080 display, Qualcomm Snapdragon 665 CPU, Open Android 13, 6GB RAM, 128GB ROM plus microSD, touch screen and six hardware buttons, two-way Bluetooth 5.0, Bluetooth transmission LDAC/aptX HD/aptX/AAC/SBC, Bluetooth reception LDAC/SBC, 2.4G/5G Wi-Fi with DLNA and AirPlay, PCM 32-bit/768kHz and DSD1024 local playback, USB DAC mode up to PCM 32-bit/384kHz and DSD256, combined 3.5mm single-ended headphone output with 4.4mm balanced output via supplied adapter, 4300mAh battery, USB-C 18W QC/PD charging, and up to 9h battery life in SE and balanced modes. Structured power uses official high-gain values: 227mW into 32 ohms single-ended and 877mW into 32 ohms balanced. Official low-gain values are 19mW SE and 227mW balanced into 32 ohms. Official 300-ohm high-gain values are 24mW SE and 93mW balanced. Official output impedance is 0.6 ohm SE and 1.0 ohm balanced. 2TB expansion is from exact-model manual/retailer evidence because the official ONIX page lists microSD but not a numerical maximum.
Bluetooth Codecs: TX: LDAC / aptX HD / aptX / AAC / SBC; RX: LDAC / SBC
